name: recently_added
description: Recently Added view for Volumio's local music library — uses MPD's built-in modified-since query
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Adds a 'Recently Added' entry to the Browse menu showing albums added to your library within configurable time windows. Reads directly from MPD's database — no separate index, no watcher, no native modules.
volumio_info.changelog: v0.5.1: packaging metadata only. Added 'repository' field pointing to the GitHub project. Removed arm64 from supported architectures (not accepted by Volumio's plugin store at this time). v0.5.0: configurable sort order for albums and artists — two new settings under Display (Albums sort, Artists sort), each offering Newest first or Alphabetical. The Albums setting also applies to artist drill-downs.
